titleStmt.title: SII 22.23: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 23. (A.R. No. 23 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. RĀJARĀJA I—15th YEAR (A.D. 998-9)

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumagaḷ pōla etc., The details of the date given viz. Āvaṇi śu. 12, Saturday, Āślēsha, give the equivalent A.D. 999, August 26, but the nakshatra was Śravaṇa not Āślēsha. The inscription records a grant of land by the sabhā of Kaḍavūr to two persons by name Pādaśivaṉ Āyirattaññūṟṟuvaṉ Kālakālaṉ alias Kaḍavūr-Vēḷāṇ and Rāmaṉ Chandraśēkharaṉ alias Nūṟṟeṇma-Vēḷāṉ, probably to provide for the playing of musical instruments during the several services and for offerings, to the deity in the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .— tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kala maṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṭikai vaḻiyuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampa
pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaiñāṭun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉ ṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiyuḷ Ellā vāṇṭun toḻutakaiviḷaṅku māṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ korāja rāja rājakesaripanmakku yāṇṭu
15Āvatu Āvaṇittiṅkaḷ muṟpakkattu pakkam paṉṉiraṇṭu kiḻamai cani nāḷ Āyilaiyam Innāḷāl Ivvāṇṭamparnāṭṭup paṭaieviya kaṭavūr sabhaiyom tiruviraṭṭānattu
pperumānaṭikaḷukku muṉṟu sandhiyum Arddhayāmamum paḷḷiyeḻucciyum potu panniraṇṭu Āṭk koṭṭakkaṭava pātacivaṉ Āyirattaiññūṟṟuvaṉ kāla kālaṉākiya kaṭavūr veḷā
ṉukkum Irāmaṉ cantiracekaraṉākiya nūṟṟeṇmaveḷāṉukkum candrāditya vaṟ niṟkak kāṇiceytu kuṭutta nilam Ivvūr kuc caṅkūti pulattukkup paṭunilam Uṭumpoṭi Āmai
taviḻntitu nirnilam ṭaippum Eppeṟppaṭṭitum Ivarkaḷ Ippaṉṉiraṇṭu tirumañcaṉa kkum śrībalikkum Arddhayāmattukkum paḷḷiye
ḻuccikkum tiruamutukkum luṅkuṟai koḷvatāka Ipparicu niccayitta pulam varkku
candrādityavaṟ niṟka kāṇi ceytu kuṭuttom
mahāsapaip perumakkaḷom Innila
m Eṭukkavum Ēṟṟavum curukkavumuṭaiyā
rāka kuṭuttom sabhaiyom .—
Digital edition of SII 22.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
